title: Cofide Trust Zone Operator Configuration Schema

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource names and labels.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the fully qualified app name used in resource names.

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for pulling the operator container image from private registries.

url.description: URL of the Connect instance. Required for Connect integration.

trustDomain.description: Trust domain of the Connect instance. Required for Connect integration.

cluster.description: Configuration identifying the cluster this operator manages.

clusterId.description: ID of the cluster this operator is running in.

baseDomain.description: Base domain for Gateway API TLSRoutes.

port.description: Port on which the health probe endpoints are served.

enabled.description: Whether to enable leader election for the operator. Should be enabled when running multiple replicas.

createAggregateRoles.description: Whether to create the admin, editor and viewer aggregate ClusterRoles for TrustZoneServer resources.

podAnnotations.description: Additional annotations to add to the operator pod.

podLabels.description: Additional labels to add to the operator pod.

serviceAccount.description: Service account configuration for the operator.

create.description: Whether to create a service account for the operator.

name.description: Name of the service account to use. If empty and create is true, a name is generated using the fullname template.

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service account.

automount.description: Whether to automount the service account token.

enabled.description: Whether to enable the metrics endpoint, metrics service, and associated RBAC.

tls.description: TLS certificate configuration for the metrics endpoint.

enabled.description: Whether to serve the metrics endpoint over HTTPS.

certSecretName.description: Name of an existing Secret containing tls.crt and tls.key. Required when metrics.tls.enabled=true.

certManager.description: Optional cert-manager integration to automatically provision the metrics TLS certificate.

enabled.description: Whether to create a cert-manager Certificate resource to supply the metrics TLS secret.

issuerName.description: Name of the cert-manager Issuer or ClusterIssuer.

type.description: Kubernetes service type for the metrics endpoint.

ports.description: Port definitions for the metrics service.

trustZoneOperator.description: Configuration for the Trust Zone Operator deployment.

replicas.description: Number of operator replicas to deploy.

args.description: Additional arguments to pass to the manager binary.

tag.description: Container image tag. Defaults to the chart appVersion if empty.

env.description: Environment variable configuration for the manager container.

spiffeEndpointSocket.description: SPIFFE endpoint socket path/URL for workload API access.

resources.description: Compute resource requests and limits for the manager container.

containerSecurityContext.description: Security context for the manager container.

podSecurityContext.description: Security context for the operator pod.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for the operator pod.

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for the operator pod.
